EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} failed to send a job to the printer "{object.value}"
The user {subject.name} failed to send a job to the printer "{object.value}" due to the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} sent a job to the printer "{object.value}"
The user {subject.name} sent a job to the printer "{object.value}" in violation of the policies: {datafield6}
